scripts.test:dashboard: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.cache/dashboard-tests', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.dashboard-test.json && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.cache/dashboard-tests', { recursive: true }); require('node:fs').writeFileSync('.cache/dashboard-tests/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}');" && node --test .cache/dashboard-tests/features/dashboard/dashboard.contract.test.js
scripts.test:shell-ball: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.cache/shell-ball-tests', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.shell-ball-test.json && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.cache/shell-ball-tests', { recursive: true }); require('node:fs').writeFileSync('.cache/shell-ball-tests/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}');" && node --test .cache/shell-ball-tests/features/shell-ball/shellBall.contract.test.js
scripts.test:memory: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.cache/memory-tests', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.memory-test.json && node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('.cache/memory-tests', { recursive: true }); require('node:fs').writeFileSync('.cache/memory-tests/package.json', '{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}');" && node --test .cache/memory-tests/apps/desktop/src/features/dashboard/memory/mirror.contract.test.js
